name: Crabby Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the crab meat, bread crumbs, onion, salt, parsley, and chopped mushroom stems.
2. Add the beaten egg and hot sauce to the mixture.
3. Stuff the mixture into the mushroom caps.
4. Bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 to 30 minutes, or until tender.
5. Serve hot.
